title: nigritella nigra subsp. rhellicani
intro: Nigritella nigra subsp. rhellicani, also known as Rhellican's nigritella, is a subspecies of the Nigritella nigra plant, which is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nigritella nigra subsp. rhellicani are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
